points: Delivered end-to-end client solutions including website development, domain management, email setup, and production deployment.
Managed full deployment lifecycle including domain configuration, DNS records (A, MX, TXT), and hosting setup using Namecheap, GoDaddy, Vercel, and Hostinger.
Handled high-volume customer interactions for Standard Chartered Bank (SCB) campaigns, assisting clients with financial product inquiries.
Promoted and sold financial products including Recurring Deposits (RD) and SIP investment plans through outbound calls.
Maintained professional client communication while meeting daily sales and engagement targets.
